reviews.review_description:
I love this. You fly around corners very fast and go upside down more effectively than other coaster games for the Go. 

Works great on the oculus Go. Awesome
What a rush . It actually made me feel queezy  �

developer_response.body: Hi roy.wassall, We are very happy to know you liked and had fun! Thank you very much for your review.

reviews.review_description: Seems a bargain at 3 rides, and appreciate the effort. But I got quite a bit of stutter on my s7, and combined with some turns that are steeply banked, I had to tap out halfway through the first ride. Maybe others won't have the same issues

developer_response.body: Hi TecmoBowlTed, Nice to know you liked and had fun, Thank you  for your review!

reviews.review_description:
This roller coaster has an incredible potencial but the three different rides are too slow. Even when you're falling it doesn't speed up. You should fix this immediately, because this is a waste of time and money.
______________________________________
Good! Now this is a real roller coaster. Although I've some recommendations for you. Avoid sharp curves because they lack realism. For example, the first ride, which has none, is way more realistic than the others. Thanks for updating! I really enjoyed the rides!

developer_response.body: Hi Alchowesca, Great to know you liked the update, your recommendations are very welcome, We will continuing update and make it even better, Thank you very much for your review.

reviews.review_description: That first rollercoaster gave me my first bad experience with motion sickness since owning a vr.  At one point,  I had to remove the headset for a second.  The last rollercoaster was the best one though.  It had more speed,  things going on in the air around you,  and didn't cause any motion sickness.

developer_response.body: Hi catxel, We are happy to know you liked. sickness some people are more sensitive then another to sensations like higher or faster, but We are always working to improve it, thank you for your review.

reviews.review_title: The game works on some Galaxy S7 phones
reviews.review_description: Please update the game. It works on the Galaxy 7. The Galaxy S9 does not support running the game

developer_response.body: Hi yusef1234y1, Nice to know you liked and had fun, Thank you very much for your review!

reviews.review_description: Good value love these roller coaster rides and for little money you get three,Can't be bad

developer_response.body: Hi ray.bradshaw 1, Great to know you are having fun, also is very important to know the value is worth for you guys, We are working to do even better. Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description: The graphics were OK at best. The problem is that, even on the "fast" ride,  it just chugged along like a kiddie ride. I was running this On an S7 and it felt like I could have run along the side of the car faster than it appeared to be moving.  Don't waste your money. I wish I had t wasted mine.

developer_response.body:
Hi Levon61, You liked the graphics this is good, thanks.
We made a update, the version 1.3 the velocity was increased, please test this version, and review again.
We are working to delivery the best experience, so We would like to understand more about your opinion and point of view to improve it.
Access our web site and send more detail about what you didn't like also send more detail about what you would like to see at our roller coaster. We will work to improve it even more and make you very happy!
http://www.netdinamica.com.br/#contact
Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Purchased this game and it won't fully download

developer_response.body: Hi monique.merritt, Please reset the device and try again, this look like a internet connection problem.

reviews.review_title: Puts the c.r.a.p. in Coaster App
reviews.review_description: I love me some VR coasters, and I am always willing to check new ones out with different concepts. Nothing beats landing a surprise hit. Unfortunately, that did not happen here. The concept is there; this could have made for a highly intense experience. But the cheap graphics and amateurish approach sinks any hope for visceral fear. I’ll add one star because perhaps at one time this may have been seen as an app of quality, but compared to some of the great coasters of today, there is little reason for this to even exist on the Oculus store anymore.
I think I own every roller coaster experience available for Oculus Go and most are disappointing. This is definitely a ride you won’t forget! Please provide additional rides.
